title: State-Level Science Exhibition Winner
description: Our students secured first place in the Kerala State-Level Science Exhibition with their innovative renewable energy project.

title: District Football Champions
description: SMHSS football team emerged as district champions in the inter-school football tournament.

title: 100% Board Exam Results
description: Achieved 100% pass rate in both SSLC and Higher Secondary board examinations with multiple A+ grades.

title: Best NSS Unit Award
description: Recognized as the Best NSS Unit at the university level for outstanding community service.

title: National-Level Quiz Champions
description: Our quiz team represented Kerala at the national level and secured second position.

title: Green School Certification
description: Received Green School certification for environmental conservation initiatives and sustainable campus practices.

title: State Arts Festival Winners
description: Multiple students won individual and group prizes at the Kerala State Youth Festival.

title: Digital Innovation Award
description: Recognized for pioneering digital education integration during the pandemic period.
